creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Switch the default ruby version to 2.6 (see depending port), you will get the following error:
http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/120amd64-default-PR238988/2019-08-28_05h21m12s/logs/ruby26-htree-0.8.log

I checked the port upstream at it seems to be dead.
Should we mark it as broken for ruby 2.6?
